svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net"> <diagram name="Multi-tenant SaaS Architecture" id="multi-tenant-saas"> <mxGraphModel dx="1200" dy="800" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1400" pageHeight="900" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <!-- AWS Cloud Container --> <mxCell id="aws-cloud" value="AWS Cloud" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_aws_cloud;strokeColor=#AAB7B8;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#232F3E;dashed=0;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="80" width="1240" height="740" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Region Container --> <mxCell id="region" value="Region" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;gradientColor=none;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;container=1;pointerEvents=0;collapsible=0;recursiveResize=0;shape=mxgraph.aws4.group;grIcon=mxgraph.aws4.group_region;strokeColor=#00A4A6;fillColor=none;verticalAlign=top;align=left;spacingLeft=30;fontColor=#147EBA;dashed=1;" vertex="1" parent="aws-cloud"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="40" width="1160" height="660" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Tenant Users --> <mxCell id="tenant-users" value="Tenant Users" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#232F3D;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.users;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="40" y="360" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Amazon Cognito --> <mxCell id="cognito" value="Amazon Cognito
User Pool" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#DD344C;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cognito;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="260" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- API Gateway --> <mxCell id="api-gateway" value="Amazon API Gateway
(Regional)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#E7157B;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.api_gateway;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="280" y="260" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda - Tenant API --> <mxCell id="lambda-api" value="Lambda Function
(Tenant API)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="180" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda - Onboarding --> <mxCell id="lambda-onboarding" value="Lambda Function
(Onboarding)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#ED7100;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.lambda_function;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="480" y="340" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- DynamoDB - Tenant Metadata --> <mxCell id="dynamodb-metadata" value="DynamoDB
(Tenant Metadata)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="340" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- DynamoDB - Tenant Data --> <mxCell id="dynamodb-data" value="DynamoDB
(Tenant Data)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#C925D1;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.dynamodb;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="180" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- S3 Bucket --> <mxCell id="s3-bucket" value="Amazon S3
(Tenant Data)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#7AA116;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.s3_bucket;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="720" y="80" width="60" height="62" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- CloudWatch --> <mxCell id="cloudwatch" value="Amazon CloudWatch
(Logs & Metrics)" style="sketch=0;outlineConnect=0;fontColor=#232F3E;gradientColor=none;fillColor=#F34482;strokeColor=none;dashed=0;verticalLabelPosition=bottom;verticalAlign=top;align=center;html=1;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;aspect=fixed;pointerEvents=1;shape=mxgraph.aws4.cloudwatch;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="920" y="260" width="60" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Connections --> <!-- Users to Cognito --> <mxCell id="edge-users-cognito" value="Authenticate" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="1" source="tenant-users" target="cognito"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Users to API Gateway --> <mxCell id="edge-users-api" value="HTTPS" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="1" source="tenant-users" target="api-gateway"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Cognito to API Gateway --> <mxCell id="edge-cognito-api" value="JWT Token" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="region" source="cognito" target="api-gateway"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- API Gateway to Lambda API --> <mxCell id="edge-api-lambda-api" value="Invoke" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" target="lambda-api"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- API Gateway to Lambda Onboarding --> <mxCell id="edge-api-lambda-onboarding" value="Invoke" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" target="lambda-onboarding"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda API to DynamoDB Data --> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-api-dynamodb-data" value="Query/Put
(tenant_id)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-api" target="dynamodb-data"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda API to S3 --> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-api-s3" value="Get/Put
(prefix isolation)" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-api" target="s3-bucket"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda Onboarding to DynamoDB Metadata --> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-onboarding-dynamodb-metadata" value="PutItem" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-onboarding" target="dynamodb-metadata"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda Onboarding to Cognito --> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-onboarding-cognito" value="Create User" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=2;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-onboarding" target="cognito"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Lambda to CloudWatch --> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-api-cloudwatch" value="Logs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-api" target="cloudwatch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-lambda-onboarding-cloudwatch" value="Logs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="region" source="lambda-onboarding" target="cloudwatch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- API Gateway to CloudWatch --> <mxCell id="edge-api-cloudwatch" value="Logs" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;strokeWidth=1;strokeColor=#545B64;fontSize=11;dashed=1;" edge="1" parent="region" source="api-gateway" target="cloudwatch"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Tenant Isolation Note --> <mxCell id="isolation-note" value="Tenant Isolation:
- Cognito custom:tenant_id attribute
- DynamoDB partition key (tenant_id)
- S3 prefix-based isolation
- IAM policy enforcement" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF4E6;strokeColor=#D79B00;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="80" y="480" width="260" height="120" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <!-- Architecture Pattern Note --> <mxCell id="pattern-note" value="Architecture Pattern:
- Pool model (shared resources)
- Serverless (cost-optimized)
- ARM64 Lambda (20% cost savings)
- Pay-per-request DynamoDB" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E6F2FF;strokeColor=#0066CC;align=left;verticalAlign=top;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" vertex="1" parent="region"> <mxGeometry x="400" y="480" width="260" height="120" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram></mxfile>
svg.text: マルチテナント SaaS アーキテクチャ
